ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with two pages. All fields legible.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The reference 'SO 25470' is an order number, and 'SEG-26D-465919' is a certificate number. Neither constitutes an LC reference with bank-term context.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: header/issuer block 'SOIC Global Trading AB, Forsta Langgatan 28B, Gothenburg 41327 Sweden'
Invoice page 2: header block 'SOIC Global Trading AB, Forsta Langgatan 28B, Gothenburg 41327 Sweden'
Invoice page 2: payment instructions 'Account Holder: SOIC Global Trading AB'

criteria_met: Certificate invoice reference '11752' matches invoice number 'NO. 11752'.
Certificate consignor 'SOIC Global Trading AB' identified as invoice issuer.
Certificate consignee 'Wimro Packaging Industries' identified in invoice 'INVOICE TO' and 'CONSIGNEE' fields.
pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are met. Valid document pair.

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'SOIC Global Trading AB' found as invoice issuer in header on page 1 and page 2, and in payment instructions on page 2.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor 'SOIC Global Trading AB' exactly matches invoice issuer 'SOIC Global Trading AB'
Certificate country 'Sweden' matches invoice country 'Sweden' (explicit in issuer address block). Also confirmed via IBAN prefix SE.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found in invoice issuer header
Country check - exact match after normalization

consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'SOIC Global Trading AB' is exactly identified as the invoice issuer on page 1 and page 2 of the invoice. Country 'Sweden' matches explicitly in the issuer address block and is corroborated by IBAN prefix SE. Full MATCH.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'SOIC Global Trading AB, Forsta Langgatan 28B, 41327, Gothenburg, Sweden'. Invoice text: 'SOIC Global Trading AB, Forsta Langgatan 28B, Gothenburg 41327 Sweden'. Company name identical. Country 'Sweden' identical. Address components identical (minor format difference in postcode placement is non-material). Rule 4.1.0 satisfied directly.

consignee.certificate_value: Wimro Packaging Industries, Hirikuluwa, Muddaragama, Sri Lanka
consignee.invoice_value: Wimro Packaging Industries, Hirikuluwa, Muddaragama, Sri Lanka

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has both 'INVOICE TO' and 'CONSIGNEE' fields. Both name the same party: 'Wimro Packaging Industries'. Primary field 'INVOICE TO' used for verification.
Certificate consignee 'Wimro Packaging Industries' exactly matches invoice 'INVOICE TO' field 'Wimro Packaging Industries'
Certificate country 'Sri Lanka' matches invoice 'INVOICE TO' country 'Sri Lanka'

rules_applied.description: Priority identification - INVOICE TO field used as primary

consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'Wimro Packaging Industries' is exactly identified in the invoice 'INVOICE TO' field. Country 'Sri Lanka' matches exactly. Address components (Hirikuluwa, Muddaragama) are identical. Full MATCH.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'Wimro Packaging Industries, Hirikuluwa, Muddaragama, Sri Lanka'. Invoice INVOICE TO: 'Wimro Packaging Industries, Hirikuluwa, Muddaragama, Sri Lanka'. Exact match on company name, address and country. Also confirmed in CONSIGNEE field with identical details. Rule 4.2.0.2 priority: INVOICE TO field used as authoritative.

goods_description.certificate_value:
SO 25470
TESTLINER PAPER FSC
MEDIUM PAPER FSC
For description of goods see invoice 11752 dated 27/02/2026
NETWEIGHT 49.915 MT
goods_description.invoice_value: Testliner - FSC (rows 1-6), Medium Paper - FSC (rows 7-12); TEST LINER PAPER - FSC HS CODE 48052400, MEDIUM PAPER - FSC HS CODE 48051900 (page 2)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains 'For description of goods see invoice 11752 dated 27/02/2026'. This is an express reference to the invoice. Invoice number '11752' matches exactly (EV-014). Invoice date '27/02/2026' matches exactly (EV-015). Expression 'see invoice' qualifies as an express reference per 4.3.5.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice reference verified - generell varubeskrivning accepted

comparison_steps.description: Additionally verifying product names: Certificate 'TESTLINER PAPER FSC' matches invoice page 2 'TEST LINER PAPER - FSC' and invoice page 1 'Testliner - FSC'. Certificate 'MEDIUM PAPER FSC' matches invoice page 1 'Medium Paper - FSC' and page 2 'MEDIUM PAPER - FSC'. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'TESTLINER PAPER FSC' is identifiable in invoice as 'TEST LINER PAPER - FSC' (minor formatting: space in 'TEST LINER' vs 'TESTLINER', hyphen/dash variation). 'MEDIUM PAPER FSC' is identifiable as 'Medium Paper - FSC'.
Invoice content (Testliner FSC paper and Medium Paper FSC) is fully consistent with certificate description. No contradicting goods in invoice.

rules_applied.description: Generic goods description with invoice reference - invoice number and date both match exactly. Express reference 'see invoice' present.
Controlled text matching - product names identifiable after normalization (case, hyphen, space)
Non-identity-bearing additions (HS codes, BW/RW specifications) do not affect product identity

goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains express reference to invoice 11752 dated 27/02/2026 ('For description of goods see invoice 11752 dated 27/02/2026'). Invoice number and date match exactly. Additionally, the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningar 'TESTLINER PAPER FSC' and 'MEDIUM PAPER FSC' are identifiable in the invoice (as 'Testliner - FSC' / 'TEST LINER PAPER - FSC' and 'Medium Paper - FSC' / 'MEDIUM PAPER - FSC'). The invoice content is fully consistent with the certificate description. MATCH per rule 4.3.5.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate references 'invoice 11752 dated 27/02/2026'. Invoice is NO. 11752 dated 27/02/2026 — exact match. Certificate product names: 'TESTLINER PAPER FSC' → invoice has 'Testliner - FSC' (page 1) and 'TEST LINER PAPER - FSC' (page 2). Normalization: case, hyphen removal, space collapsing yields match. 'MEDIUM PAPER FSC' → 'Medium Paper - FSC' (page 1 and 2). These are the same products with minor formatting differences (hyphen, space in TEST LINER). Rule 4.3.5 applies: express invoice reference with matching number and date. Rule 4.3.3 confirms text-level matchability. No article numbers in certificate to verify per Priority 1.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH due to 'TESTLINER PAPER' vs 'TEST LINER PAPER' (space difference)
rejected_hypotheses.reason: This is a minor formatting variation (single word vs two words). After normalization of spaces and case, 'testliner paper fsc' and 'test liner paper fsc' share the same identitetsbärande content. Additionally, rule 4.3.5 applies with express invoice reference, making detailed text matching supplementary. The invoice page 1 also uses 'Testliner' (single word) confirming both forms are used.

quantity.invoice_value: 49.915 MT (total row); Testliner subtotal 22.946 MT (sum of 6 rows); Medium Paper subtotal 26.969 MT (sum of 6 rows)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 7 contains two line quantities: 22.946 MT and 26.969 MT. Certificate Box 6 contains 'NETWEIGHT 49.915 MT'. Box 7 values are the verification-grounding quantities per rule 4.4.2.1.
comparison_steps.result: Verification quantities identified: 22.946 MT and 26.969 MT in Box 7; 49.915 MT NW in Box 6.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'NETWEIGHT 49.915 MT'. Invoice total row states '49.915 MT'. Numeric value 49.915 matches exactly. Unit MT matches. This is NET WEIGHT explicitly.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 49.915 MT found in invoice total row

comparison_steps.description: Certificate Box 7 line 1: 22.946 MT (corresponds to Testliner). Invoice Testliner rows: 4.152 + 3.418 + 3.688 + 4.050 + 3.378 + 4.260 = 22.946 MT. Exact match. Certificate Box 7 line 2: 26.969 MT (corresponds to Medium Paper). Invoice Medium Paper rows: 4.074 + 3.379 + 3.928 + 2.994 + 5.706 + 6.888 = 26.969 MT. Exact match. All conditions for 3D met: same faktura, same vara per group, same unit (MT), no other article rows included.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - both line quantities verified via 3D summation

comparison_steps.description: Three quantity values in certificate: 22.946 MT, 26.969 MT (Box 7), and NETWEIGHT 49.915 MT (Box 6). All three are verified. No contradictions found in invoice.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll - net weight 49.915 MT found in invoice total row
Weight category: NETWEIGHT explicitly stated in certificate for total. Individual line quantities in Box 7 lack explicit NW/GW category but are verified as subtotals consistent with the total.
Undantag 3D - Summering av flera rader inom samma faktura for per-product subtotals
Multiple quantity verification - all quantities verified, no contradictions

quantity.motivation: Certificate net weight total 49.915 MT is found exactly in invoice total row (49.915 MT). Certificate Box 7 line quantities (22.946 MT for Testliner, 26.969 MT for Medium Paper) are verified via 3D summation of invoice rows: Testliner 6 rows sum to 22.946 MT, Medium Paper 6 rows sum to 26.969 MT. All three quantity values match. No contradictions in invoice. MATCH.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 6: 'NETWEIGHT 49.915 MT'. Invoice total row: '49.915 MT 53 ROLLS'. Value 49.915 matches exactly. Certificate Box 7: '22.946 MT' and '26.969 MT'. Invoice lacks explicit subtotal rows per product type, so 3D summation applied. Testliner rows (6): 4.152+3.418+3.688+4.050+3.378+4.260 = 22.946 MT (exact). Medium Paper rows (6): 4.074+3.379+3.928+2.994+5.706+6.888 = 26.969 MT (exact). All 3D conditions met: same invoice (11752), same product type per group, same unit (MT). 22.946 + 26.969 = 49.915, consistent with total. No contradictions.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because Box 7 line quantities cannot be found as explicit single values in invoice
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rule 4.4.5.5 (Undantag 3D) explicitly allows summation of multiple rows within the same invoice when all conditions are met. The subtotals 22.946 and 26.969 are confirmed by summation.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice page 2 states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. This is an explicit origin field.

Certificate states 'EU GERMANY'. This is EU combined with one specific EU member state (Germany). Germany is an EU member state (DE in EU-27). Invoice states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. Germany is explicitly identified in the invoice. Applying 4.5.4.2.1: certificate says 'EU [one member state]', invoice has explicit origin field confirming 'GERMANY'. EU origin subsumes Germany. The generellt EU-ursprungsuttalande is not needed because Germany is explicitly named — direct match on the named country.

Certificate origin 'EU GERMANY' = EU + Germany. Invoice origin = 'GERMANY'. Germany is an EU member state. Certificate's EU designation is consistent with Germany. No non-EU origins in invoice. No contradictions.

Certificate states 'EU GERMANY' — EU combined with ONE specific EU member state. Invoice states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. Germany (the specific country) is explicitly confirmed in the invoice. Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate says 'EU [one member state]' and invoice confirms the specific country in an explicit origin field, this is MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Identification of origin field in invoice
EU member state normalization - Germany is EU member
EU [one member state] undantag - certificate 'EU GERMANY', invoice 'GERMANY' → MATCH
EU normalization - no non-EU contradictions in invoice

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate origin is 'EU GERMANY'. Invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY' on page 2. Germany is an EU member state. Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, certificate's 'EU [one member state]' is verified when the invoice confirms the specific country. Germany is confirmed. No non-EU origins in invoice. MATCH.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3: 'EU GERMANY'. Invoice page 2: 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. This is a dedicated origin field per 4.5.1. Certificate states EU combined with one member state (Germany). Invoice confirms Germany explicitly. Per 4.5.4.2: EU ↔ member state is exchangeable. Per 4.5.4.2.1: 'EU [one member state]' in certificate + explicit origin field in invoice confirming the member state = MATCH. No additional non-EU origins in invoice. No contradictions.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice says only 'GERMANY' but certificate says 'EU GERMANY'
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Rule 4.5.4.2 explicitly states that EU ↔ specific EU member state is exchangeable. Rule 4.5.4.2.1 specifically handles the case 'EU [one member state]' in certificate matched against the specific country in invoice. Germany is EU-27 member. This is a documented normalization, not a semantic interpretation.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate. 'SO 25470' is an order number. 'SEG-26D-465919' is a certificate number. Neither contains bank-term context.

Document A is Certificate of Origin (ICC/EU ORIGINAL). Document B is Commercial Invoice (NO. 11752). Certificate references invoice 11752 dated 27/02/2026, which matches the invoice. Consignor SOIC Global Trading AB is the invoice issuer.

All three criteria met: (1) certificate invoice ref '11752' matches invoice '11752'; (2) consignor 'SOIC Global Trading AB' is invoice issuer; (3) consignee 'Wimro Packaging Industries' is in INVOICE TO and CONSIGNEE fields.
Consignor 'SOIC Global Trading AB' found as invoice issuer in header block on pages 1 and 2.
Exact name match: 'SOIC Global Trading AB' = 'SOIC Global Trading AB'.
Sweden = Sweden. Also corroborated by IBAN prefix SE.
Invoice has INVOICE TO field (primary) and CONSIGNEE field. Both name same party. INVOICE TO used as authoritative.
Exact match: 'Wimro Packaging Industries' = 'Wimro Packaging Industries'.

Certificate contains express reference: 'For description of goods see invoice 11752 dated 27/02/2026'. Invoice number 11752 and date 27/02/2026 match exactly. Invoice content (Testliner FSC and Medium Paper FSC) is consistent with certificate description.
'TESTLINER PAPER FSC' identifiable as 'Testliner - FSC' / 'TEST LINER PAPER - FSC' in invoice. 'MEDIUM PAPER FSC' identifiable as 'Medium Paper - FSC' / 'MEDIUM PAPER - FSC'.
NETWEIGHT 49.915 MT found as invoice total 49.915 MT.
Box 7 line 1 (22.946 MT) verified via summation of 6 Testliner rows = 22.946 MT. Box 7 line 2 (26.969 MT) verified via summation of 6 Medium Paper rows = 26.969 MT.
Germany is EU-27 member state. EU ↔ Germany exchangeable.
Certificate 'EU GERMANY' = EU + one member state. Invoice 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY' confirms the specific country. Conditions met.
No non-EU origins found in invoice. Only origin stated is Germany (EU member).

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren SOIC Global Trading AB i Sverige, mottagaren Wimro Packaging Industries i Sri Lanka, varubeskrivningen (Testliner Paper FSC och Medium Paper FSC), kvantiteterna (49,915 MT totalt) och ursprungslandet Tyskland/EU kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
notes: Certificate references invoice 11752 dated 27/02/2026 with express phrase 'For description of goods see invoice'. Both match exactly.
Box 7 per-product quantities (22.946 MT and 26.969 MT) verified via 3D summation of invoice line items.
Origin 'EU GERMANY' verified against invoice 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY' using EU member state normalization.

sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprung 'EU GERMANY' verifieras mot fakturans uttryckliga ursprungsangivelse 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. Tyskland är EU-medlemsstat. Inga icke-EU-ursprung i fakturan.

human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) ger MATCH. Dokumentparet bedöms som IDENTICAL och kan rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence >= 0.97. comparison_result = IDENTICAL, workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. No inconsistencies detected.
